textByHashes.acda406028239005692bc05d8f89ffa684551f7c: I'm ruined, all because of that stupid cat! It has ruined me.
textByHashes.f7b4389322253ea2d0d987eca39908ced54cc0da: Why did it have to get itself killed? Why?
textByHashes.eb4a52f9d6ff9e2b416ab5b62fb1166d9766fb40: Trying to win my shirt back. I lost it last night in a silly bet.
textByHashes.27104a0d1441baa5d44e8b0ff007c6db427e679b: Well I've little left to lose, maybe some more hair and my trousers.
textByHashes.78dbcfc654799628e07fa9acc6b674a380410289: I ask myself the same question often.
textByHashes.d8b661ca0b1c2197b0c3820e80e96bcbb254d7bf: What am I doing down here in these pits along with these filthy dregs of society?
textByHashes.5e44961927f64c825eeeddab655c655b56238458: I'm here taking their money, that's what.
textByHashes.a155883b2393e4571eadf1bdfc0b8f6d8efd1f31: Just a bit of drinking, a bit of fighting and a few people trying to win big.
textByHashes.718925d972ae58b329563b373051c7139d3b7db8: Nothing much. Just keeping myself occupied, placing a couple of wagers here and there.
textByHashes.9d1e87276f776303365baf37884fb838c1ad881b: Yes in the sense that I'm not as bored as I was and no in terms of the number of coins in my purse.
textByHashes.04b1d21c3f854d46afe03a50ee8c77d484a7b0a6: Trying to win back some money.
textByHashes.416ad6c2b27e400a6060266e59a42d5a9f70b934: In every bet there is a fool and a thief and I'm beginning to think that I'm not much of a thief.
textByHashes.ea51978d5667f60e19cd163730a9bdfc55bd5c0f: Having fun. It's such a blast I've already won 5 thousand gold coins today, my cat just keeps winning.
textByHashes.bd27a17a362b550a354a415180c5b5f803ec5386: Things work simply in the Ardougne ratpits.
textByHashes.0379624ad2ad75ec84e52dfacf683de3c759f7d4: If you have a kitten and at least 100 coins you can challenge someone else who also has a kitten and some spare change.
textByHashes.5e3df4eee02d304c80abf3ed22b8fe7cb6955ab7: You then agree on a wager. It's rumoured that some ratcatchers can talk to their own cats and give them tactics to aid them.
textByHashes.e22b3ff2e7db0dd5b847134e3f24d7a06b249aa1: I was just getting to that. Both the challengers' cats are placed inside the arena, and whichever kills 5 rats first wins.
textByHashes.98ab2e64f5c1d10e719c2ff0c625201d46eeebc1: In Varrock if you have a grown cat and a couple of coins you can challenge someone else who also has a grown cat and some spare change.
textByHashes.fe16443a15edfcd7943bd272bb5916895565db32: I was just getting to that. Both the challengers' cats are placed inside the arena, and whichever kills 7 rats first wins.
textByHashes.9dc4b1088229cdc0e7ee85d84777a377c4cd95d5: The Port Sarim pits are quite fussy, no lazy cats allowed in here.
textByHashes.c27e7f5ba5beaedab3a0d2df950810b10a6cbfc9: You know if you neglect a wily cat, it gets fat and lazy? Well, they're not allowed to fight in here, only wily cats.
textByHashes.0d5331da9a3bfa09b956e2f1a7ca6bd4806c05ea: I was just getting to that. Both the challengers' cats are placed inside the arena, and whichever kills 11 rats first wins.
textByHashes.34fee72d4be80a69b3e1366ed9c9482840533599: It's a cruel world and the pits are no exception.
textByHashes.f5524b693ea4fb4f4bdbefdecc0c3af01ea5e238: Each to their own, I say.
textByHashes.f89efb1f3e1c7c306a98da45fa5367a675b22fa1: I agree. Cats have been known to be killed in fights.
textByHashes.2c8978892336b41478e9431a8d68ed1627891ba0: Of course there is, you can instruct it to be cautious, and it will leave once it feels as if it is in danger.
textByHashes.77133166d92ec51299ce0cad01024e008b3f02b3: That depends on how you value your cat.
textByHashes.40741783365ef16ceee4e53c4a410ba2302bacbf: Well if your cat dies or it runs away you lose.
textByHashes.6d16ff60a94433b34db2c967a3d31c28a57949b0: So the longer it stays in the fight the better chance you have of winning.
textByHashes.e3bc75043589b15dffef58baa50080d205b80ceb: One thing I know though is that it's a quick way to make and lose money.
textByHashes.0b660575731522c8a2cf45d38adaf9f90b14e4e1: Hmmm... let me think. I don't think that's ever arisen but I think it's 20,000.
textByHashes.7eceedfd30ace1e7346a881420205f988f1ce1fd: You'd be surprised what some people would be willing to bet.
textByHashes.aad3b70c8a00a21fd8a4b0deb102017c2b15f4e5: There is a minimum bet of 100 coins too.
textByHashes.7183242ec015610b2b285a2f675bdf147f0adab5: No, not now, we don't really bet with outsiders.
textByHashes.ef9099777aab9548905978dcabab747c6bf0f1e6: I don't know, maybe once you've done something to win over my trust.
textByHashes.2d854b415ec0710e1256d4dba3679e127098eaa5: No. Regular townsfolk don't like us, which leads us to distrust them and anyone else.
